ACE.raison: Game2 testnet hardens ACE→gas token on Endurance. 55% 7d rally +$153M vol vs $11M float. Thin liquidity amplifies orderly move, not capitulation. Catalyst structural, not exhausted

CASHCAT.raison: Profit-taking + liquidation cascade post-listing Hyperliquid (Jul11) & Binance (Jul14), whale shorts actifs ($529K réalisé), Poloniex listing. Meme extreme volatility.
